negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: industry_032
prompt: A close-up view of an industrial machine engaged in paper bag making, set in a factory-like environment. The machinery consists of cylindrical rollers and conveyor belts, with each paper bag handle attached to a rectangle-shaped sheet featuring textured surfaces and rope handles. These handles move smoothly from right to left onto a conveyor belt, feeding them into the next stage of production. The machine's rollers and gears rotate in unison, ensuring proper alignment and processing of the paper bag handles. The video captures the seamless automation of the process, with no manual intervention. The camera angle provides a detailed look at the intricate machinery and the systematic handling of the paper bag handles.
